category_sources: source_facts.description says small tool to convert Djvu files to PDF files; official homepage says the same and lists Linux, BSD, and MacOS support.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name; official homepage heading uses djvu2pdf.
docs_sources: Official project page is the best documentation surface, with dependencies, installation notes, and source/package downloads.
repo_sources: No official source-control repository identified; official project page provides source tarball download only, not a repository URL.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and executable; official homepage lists djvulibre-bin and ghostscript dependencies for DjVu-to-PDF conversion.
